nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 07:00
nodes.notes:
Runs 3h after API/scraper flows (04:00).
Sends all jobs from last 24h grouped by compatibility tier.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  j.job_title,
  c.name                                                    AS company_name,
  j.location,
  j.work_mode::text,
  j.priority::text,
  j.source_url,
  j.summary,
  COALESCE((ev.parsed_json->>'relevance_score')::int, 0)   AS relevance_score
FROM jobs j
JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = j.company_id
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT parsed_json
  FROM job_events
  WHERE job_id = j.id
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) ev ON TRUE
WHERE j.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC;

nodes.name: DB: Fetch All Jobs 24h
nodes.notes:
All jobs from last 24h, sorted by relevance DESC.
No threshold — all go into digest grouped by tier.

nodes.name: Format Digest Message
nodes.notes:
Groups all jobs into 3 tiers by relevance_score:
🔥 ≥80 — full details
⭐ 50–79 — brief
📋 <50 — list with link
Returns [] if no jobs — flow stops silently.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: $json.text, disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

nodes.name: Telegram: Send Digest
nodes.notes: Sends one consolidated message. disable_web_page_preview keeps it compact.
